## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `test` — Tests only
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, tooling
